q_locks_applied.Q-CP-1: Complex global gate retained as-is. Documents operational condition: all CHECK_POINT-role points failed in at least one dimension (fix_type=FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS OR position_sigma=catastrophic).
q_locks_applied.Q-CP-2: Fix type promoted to per-point gate. FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS on a single point zeros that point's score; other points continue. Affects per-point aggregation, not chain.
q_locks_applied.Q-CP-3: Per-point aggregation formula mean - 0.25*(100 - worst_point) LOCKED as v2.1 design. k=0.25 penalty coefficient is operationally calibrated.
q_locks_applied.Q-CP-4: No device-type special handling. All device types (CB_X, AEROPOINT, DGPS, OTHER) treated uniformly. RTK antenna height documentation is field operation, not factory-known.
q_locks_applied.Q-CP-5: No new pattern concepts. Check_point propagates existing patterns: per-point scoring, per-point gates, per-point aggregation, null case, device-types.

_meta.design_summary: Per-point RTK capture-confidence score with mean-minus-worst aggregation. Hardware-independent of other capture chains; purely device exports + operation logs + user input + timing context. Simplest capture chain (14 indicators, 3 blocks). Per-point aggregation formula: mean - 0.25*(100-min). Two indicator-level gates (Q-CP-2 fix_type per-point, antenna_height per-point). Global gate fires when ALL points fail in at least one dimension. Null case when no CHECK_POINT-role points designated.

source_files.physical_source: Exported from RTK rover (CB_X / Trimble / Emlid / OTHER) per occupation
source_files.how_to_obtain: Each RTK check-point capture produces a record in the device export: per-point coordinate, fix_type at capture moment, receiver-estimated sigma (H/V precision), correction age at capture, fix hold duration, PDOP, satellite count, CN0, antenna info. CB_X exports full set; Trimble/Emlid exports subset depending on export config; OTHER variable.
source_files.notes: Per-point RTK device record. Replaces RINEX from PPK chains — RTK does not produce extended observation file for post-processing. Per-point sigma is the universal anchor indicator.

source_files.physical_source: Exported from capture app session (CB_X app, Trimble Access, Emlid Reach app)
source_files.how_to_obtain: Session-level log: download confirmation, signature/integrity verification, session boundaries. CB_X expected-present with signature; Trimble/Emlid expected-present without signature; OTHER expected-absent.
source_files.notes: Behaviour branches on device_type. CB_X is designed to produce signed logs for tamper-evidence; third-party gear typically does not.

source_files.physical_source: Entered by operator in CB capture app at upload, one record per occupation
source_files.how_to_obtain: Structured field form filled per occupation: device_type, antenna setup, baseline length, NTRIP mountpoint, expected mountpoint, target/mark info, accuracy target. Operator-declarative fields (mark_integrity_confirmed, tilt_compensation_used on non-tilt-comp gear, mark_photo_captured) are advisory only — zero scoring weight per Concern 5.
source_files.notes: Per-point operator metadata. Form design itself is the safeguard against antenna-height blunders. Tilt-compensation reads logged tilt verifiably on tilt-comp devices; falls back to advisory boolean on hand-held pole.

source_fields.meaning: Mark/point identifier from device export.
Final captured ECEF coordinate from RTK device.
Receiver-estimated per-point horizontal standard deviation (sigma). The universal anchor indicator. Exported by all RTK devices in principle; may be absent in restricted export configs.
Receiver-estimated per-point vertical standard deviation.
Solution status at capture moment: FIXED / FLOAT / AUTONOMOUS. Hard-gates per-point completeness if FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS.
Age of the RTK correction stream at the capture moment. May be missing on some third-party exports (Trimble JXL / Emlid CSV).
How long the rover held FIXED before this capture. CB_X full; Trimble/Emlid partial; OTHER often N/A.
Position dilution of precision at the capture epoch.
Tracked satellite count at the capture epoch.
Mean carrier-to-noise density across tracked satellites at capture.
Antenna model as configured/auto-detected by the rover.
Device serial / ID from the rover.
Logged tilt angle at capture (tilt-compensated rovers only — CB_X, Trimble R12+, Emlid RS3+). N/A for older devices.
UTC timestamp of the capture moment.
RTK device firmware version.
True once the device session has been downloaded/synced from the rover.
Signature validation result. CB_X expected; Trimble partial; Emlid/OTHER typically N/A.
True if session was closed deliberately (not via crash/power loss).
Device-reported session end (UTC). Cross-check against capture timestamps.
Enum: CB_X / AEROPOINT / DGPS / OTHER. Drives oplog branching, antenna-height auto-fill, and indicator data-availability logic.
Operator-entered device ID. Cross-checked vs RTK device-reported device_id.
Locked to CHECK_POINT for this score. GCP-role points are excluded (covered by gcp_score).
Operator-selected antenna model. Cross-checked vs RTK device antenna_type.
Operator-entered antenna height. CB_X / AEROPOINT: factory-known and auto-filled (indicator = 100). DGPS / OTHER: operator-measured.
Explicit units (m/ft).
VERTICAL or SLANT. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
ARP / SLANT_MARK / MOUNT_BOTTOM / OTHER. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
Number of independent height measurements. Only meaningful for DGPS / OTHER.
Boolean — operator-declarative. ADVISORY only on non-tilt-comp devices (cannot be verified). On tilt-comp devices, replaced by logged tilt_logged_deg which IS verifiable.
Distance from rover to base/CORS at capture time. Critical for India where CORS coverage is patchy.
NTRIP mountpoint operator was connected to.
Project-declared expected mountpoint. Cross-check against actual.
Survey accuracy target (e.g. 0.02 m for cm-grade work). σ thresholds expressed as multiples of this target.
Mark physical type (printed_paper / painted / cb_x_surface / aeropoint_surface / dgps_peg / other).
Operator confirmation that the mark was intact at capture. ADVISORY only — not scored.
Boolean — was a photo of the mark taken. ADVISORY flag CP_NO_MARK_PHOTO if False.
Drone flight start (UTC) from upload bundle. Used to compute capture-to-flight delay.
Drone flight end (UTC) from upload bundle.

derived_fields.meaning: Ratio of receiver-estimated horizontal sigma to survey accuracy target. The primary quality indicator. Banded at 1×/2×/5× target.
Whether per-point sigma is available in the device export. False triggers either Scenario 1 (exported subset missing sigma) or Scenario 2 (device truly does not report).
Whether sigma should be exported for this device type. If True but sigma is missing → Scenario 1 (fixable by re-export). If False and sigma is missing → Scenario 2 (device limit, N/A treatment).
Whether antenna height is factory-known for this device type. When True, antenna_height_documented_score = 100 by definition.

derived_fields.formula_expression: |antenna_height_m (form) - antenna_delta_h (device)| within tolerance, when both populated

derived_fields.meaning: Form vs device antenna type consistency.
Form vs device ID match. Provenance check, not accuracy.

derived_fields.formula_expression: device_type supports tilt logging AND tilt_logged_deg IS NOT NULL
derived_fields.meaning: Whether tilt can be verified from device log (vs operator-declarative boolean).
Whether actual NTRIP mountpoint matches project-declared expected mountpoint.

derived_fields.formula_expression: (capture_utc - flight_end_utc) / 3600  -- positive if capture after flight
derived_fields.meaning: Hours between drone flight end and check-point capture. Positive = after flight (preferred).
True if capture occurred before drone flight start.
True if capture occurred during drone flight window.

derived_fields.formula_expression: NOAA SWPC Kp index at capture_utc
derived_fields.meaning: External geomagnetic activity index. KNOWN LIMITATION: Kp under-detects equatorial scintillation (relevant for India). Long-term roadmap: S4/ROTI from regional reference.

derived_fields.formula_expression: device firmware/model exposes L1+L2 carrier phase
derived_fields.meaning: Whether the device captured dual-frequency data — mitigates ionospheric impact.

derived_fields.formula_expression: device_type-aware: CB_X / DGPS / AEROPOINT: completed_normally AND signature valid (if available); OTHER: signature N/A, integrity based on download confirmation
derived_fields.meaning: Whether the capture session terminated cleanly with download confirmed and signature (where applicable) intact.

derived_fields.formula_expression: count of CHECK_POINT-role points where per_point_score > 0
derived_fields.meaning: Number of CP points that survived per-point gates. Drives the conditional severity escalation of CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED.

indicators.threshold_summary: PRIMARY INDICATOR. σ available: σ_h ≤ accuracy_target → 100; 1-2× target → 70 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_MARGINAL; 2-5× → 30 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_HIGH; >5× → 0 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_REJECT. σ absent AND expected → 50 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_NOT_EXPORTED (user can re-export). σ absent AND not expected (device limit) → N/A, weight redistributes to other category-A indicators.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ✓ usually / Emlid: ✓ usually / OTHER: variable (graceful degradation)

indicators.gate_action: Sets per-point completeness sub-score = 0. FLAGS: CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED or CP_AUTONOMOUS_ACCEPTED. Severity escalates to CATASTROPHIC when effective_check_point_count < 5.
indicators.threshold_summary: FIXED → 100; FLOAT → 0 + CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED (CRITICAL, escalates to CAT if N<5); AUTONOMOUS → 0 + CP_AUTONOMOUS_ACCEPTED.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ✓ (solution-status flag) / Emlid: ✓ / OTHER: usually ✓
indicators.per_point_gate_action: When fix_type at capture is FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS (not FIXED RTK), this point's score is zeroed. Other points continue to score. Per-point aggregation penalizes this point but does not kill the chain.
indicators.v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-CP-2: promoted to per-point gate. FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS fix on a single point zeros that point; aggregation dilutes across fleet.

indicators.threshold_summary: ≤2s → 100; 2-5s → 88; 5-15s → 60 + CP_STALE_CORRECTION; 15-30s → 30 + CP_STALE_CORRECTION; >30s → 0 + CP_CORRECTION_LOST. When absent (not in export) → N/A, weight redistributes.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ⚠ partial (often absent in JXL export) / Emlid: ⚠ partial / OTHER: typically absent

indicators.threshold_summary: downloaded AND signature valid (CB_X / Trimble where available) → 100; downloaded AND signature N/A (Emlid / OTHER) → 80; download unconfirmed → 50 + CP_LOG_DOWNLOAD_UNCONFIRMED; signature invalid → 30 + CP_LOG_TAMPERED.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ signed / Trimble: ✓ partial signed / Emlid: ⚠ unsigned / OTHER: typically unsigned

indicators.gate_action: Sets per-point setup sub-score = 0. FLAG: CP_POINT_ANTENNA_HEIGHT_MISSING.
indicators.threshold_summary: antenna_height_auto_known=True (CB_X / AEROPOINT) → 100 (factory-known). device_type=DGPS / OTHER: VERTICAL AND ARP AND count≥3 AND device-report agreement → 100; single VERTICAL → 88; SLANT → 72; conflict with device-reported → 55 (review); no height entered → 0 + gate.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X / AEROPOINT: ✓ factory / DGPS: ✓ operator / OTHER: ✓ operator

indicators.threshold_summary: Tilt-comp-capable device (CB_X / R12+ / RS3+) with logged tilt: tilt ≤2° → 100; 2-4° → 70; >4° → 30 + CP_HIGH_TILT. Older/hand-held: tilt_compensation_used boolean is ADVISORY ONLY (operator-declarative cannot be verified) → 70 (unconfirmed); if explicitly False → 50.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X (tilt-comp): ✓ verifiable / Trimble R12+: ✓ verifiable / Emlid RS3+: ✓ verifiable / Older devices: declarative advisory only

indicators.threshold_summary: ≤5km → 100; 5-10km → 88; 10-20km → 70 + CP_LONG_BASELINE; 20-40km → 40 + CP_EXCESSIVE_BASELINE; >40km → 20 + CP_EXCESSIVE_BASELINE. Particularly relevant in regions with patchy CORS coverage (e.g. India).
mountpoint_match=True → 100; mountpoint_match=False → 40 + CP_UNEXPECTED_MOUNTPOINT; expected_mountpoint not declared → 70 (unconfirmed).
Match → 100; mismatch → 60 + CP_ANTENNA_TYPE_MISMATCH (MEDIUM). Sub-cm to ~3 cm vertical impact for typical short-baseline drone-survey targets.
Match → 100; mismatch → 60 + CP_DEVICE_ID_MISMATCH (MEDIUM provenance, reviewer-blocking); either side missing → 70 (unconfirmed).
≤2 → 100; 2-4 → 80; 4-6 → 55; >6 → 30 + CP_HIGH_PDOP. Distinct from multipath — captures sky geometry at the capture moment.
≥5s held FIXED → 100; 1-4s → 60 + CP_SHORT_FIX_HOLD; <1s → 30 + CP_NO_FIX_HOLD. When absent → N/A, weight redistributes.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ⚠ partial / Emlid: ⚠ partial / OTHER: typically N/A

indicators.threshold_summary: sats ≥10 AND CN0 ≥40 dBHz → 100; sats 7-9 OR CN0 30-40 → 70; sats <7 OR CN0 <30 → 35 + CP_HIGH_MULTIPATH. Less able to detect multipath than PPK (no extended observation to compute variance).

Kp ≤4 OR dual_freq → 100; Kp 5-6 single-freq → 60; Kp ≥7 single-freq → 40 + CP_IONO_RISK. KNOWN LIMITATION: Kp under-detects equatorial scintillation (relevant for India); long-term roadmap to S4/ROTI source.
indicators.data_availability_by_device_type: External NOAA SWPC dependency; same for all device types

building_blocks.question: Are the per-point captures present, RTK-fix-quality acceptable, and recorded reliably?
building_blocks.operator_action: Re-occupy affected points; verify FIXED fix before storing
building_blocks.aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_completeness, k=0.25
building_blocks.gate_condition: every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_fix_type_score=0 (all FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS) OR cp_position_sigma_score=0

building_blocks.question: Is per-point operator metadata trustworthy and baseline/mountpoint correctly configured?
building_blocks.operator_action: Re-measure antenna height; verify mountpoint; bipod or tilt-comp rover
building_blocks.aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_setup_confidence, k=0.25
building_blocks.indicators_within: cp_antenna_height_documented_score(0.40), cp_pole_stability_score(0.20), cp_baseline_length_score(0.15), cp_ntrip_mountpoint_score(0.10), cp_antenna_type_match_score(0.10), cp_device_id_match_score(0.05)

building_blocks.question: Was the sky and environment good at each capture moment?
building_blocks.operator_action: Relocate next time; accept noise; capture at lower-iono time
building_blocks.aggregator: mean − k × (100 − min) across CHECK_POINT-role per_point_environment, k=0.25

flags.condition: every CP point has cp_fix_type_score=0 OR cp_position_sigma_score=0
flags.meaning: No usable check-point captures across the survey — check_point_score = 0. Parallels DRONE_CRITICAL_FAILURE / BASE_CRITICAL_FAILURE / GCP_CRITICAL_FAILURE structurally; defined independently.
No designated check points in this survey. check_point_score = null. Pre-processing handles survey-design implication.
Per-point antenna height not entered for a non-factory-known device — per_point_setup_confidence = 0.
Rover was in FLOAT (decimetre-level) at capture moment — per_point_completeness = 0. Severity escalates to CATASTROPHIC when effective_check_point_count < 5.
Rover was in AUTONOMOUS (metre-level) at capture — per_point_completeness = 0.
Receiver-estimated sigma at 1-2× survey accuracy target — marginal.
Receiver-estimated sigma at 2-5× accuracy target — degraded.
Receiver-estimated sigma at >5× accuracy target — point not usable.
Sigma should be in export for this device type but is missing — user can re-export with precision columns enabled.
RTK correction stream was stale at capture — accuracy degraded.
RTK correction stream effectively lost at capture moment.
Baseline to base/CORS is long enough to introduce distance-dependent error.
Baseline excessive — accuracy claim should be downgraded.
Verified pole tilt exceeds threshold — horizontal accuracy degraded by pole-length × sin(tilt).

flags.condition: every single-occupation point (always fires in v1)
flags.meaning: Single occupation cannot detect false fix. Advisory only — zero scoring weight. Roadmap: dual-occupation workflow enables repeatability_check_score.
Per-point form/device ID disagreement — provenance concern, reviewer-blocking.
Obstruction-prone capture environment.
Ionospheric disturbance likely degraded accuracy. Documented limit: Kp under-detects equatorial scintillation.
Poor satellite geometry at the capture epoch.
Fix held briefly before capture — accuracy may reflect transient state.
Single-epoch capture without held fix — accuracy may reflect transient state.
NTRIP mountpoint differs from project-declared expected — corrections may be in different reference frame.
Check-point captured >24 hours after drone flight — mark may have been disturbed.
Check-point captured >7 days after drone flight — likelihood of mark disturbance significant.
Check-point captured before drone flight — site conditions may have changed.
Check-point captured during drone flight window — workflow advisory only, not an accuracy concern.
Session log not confirmed downloaded.
Session log signature failed validation — possible manual edit.
No photo of the mark and surroundings — cannot retroactively investigate questionable points.
Form vs device antenna type mismatch — sub-cm to cm vertical impact.

problem_coverage.covered_by: cp_fix_type_score + hard gate + conditional severity escalation
base_station_score (BENCHMARK_UNVERIFIED, AUTONOMOUS_SEED). Documented in check_point_score known_limitations; no detection here.
pre_processing_score. Documented; no detection here. Silent-invisible failure class.
pre_processing_score. Documented; no detection here. Silent-invisible failure class.
CP_NO_REPEATABILITY_CHECK advisory flag (zero weight). Documented detection gap. Roadmap: repeatability_check_score with dual-occupation workflow.

problem_coverage.problem: Mark Disturbed Between Flight and Capture

problem_coverage.covered_by: CP_NO_MARK_PHOTO advisory flag is a weak proxy — mark photo presence enables retrospective verification but does not detect wrong-point capture at scoring time. Common subtle case (10-30 cm off the intended mark) not scoreable from any available data.

problem_coverage.problem: Check Points Not Spatially Independent from GCPs
Too Few Check Points for Statistical Validity

problem_coverage.covered_by: cp_ionospheric_risk_score (with documented Kp limitation for India)
cp_pole_stability_score (verifiable on tilt-comp; advisory on hand-held)

problem_coverage.problem: CP Used as Control in Bundle Adjustment
problem_coverage.covered_by: Future processing_score. Pre-committed catalog row; documented as known failure class.
cp_position_sigma_score — PRIMARY anchor indicator with graceful degradation

check_point_score.phase: single (computed once at Stage 1; never revised)
check_point_score.purpose: Hardware-derived RTK capture-confidence score. Measures per-point signal quality, setup documentation, and observation environment.
check_point_score.aggregator: mean − 0.25 × (100 − min) within each role-block, applied across all CHECK_POINT-role points (Q-CP-3 LOCKED)
check_point_score.global_gate_condition: (every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_fix_type_score == 0) OR (every CHECK_POINT-role point has cp_position_sigma_score == 0)
check_point_score.global_gate_action: When all designated CHECK_POINT-role points have failed fix type (FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS accepted) or all points have catastrophic position sigma, check_point_score = 0. Raises FLAG: CP_CRITICAL_FAILURE. Q-CP-2: individual point failures (fix_type per-point gate) do NOT kill the chain; aggregation penalizes via dilution.
check_point_score.severity_of_finding_vocabulary: Indicator-band level severity. Four values: NONE (band passed) → MINOR (hygiene signal, audit-only) → MATERIAL (warrants review) → CRITICAL (warrants resurvey).
check_point_score.verification_status_field: Separate categorical. VALUES: RTK_VERIFIED_HIGH (fixed RTK on all points); RTK_VERIFIED_MARGINAL (some FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS or material findings); RTK_VERIFIED_FAIL (critical finding present); RTK_GLOBAL_GATE_FIRED (all points failed). NEVER score-gating. Verification basis reported separately.
check_point_score.tier_interpretation: Gold 90-100 / Silver 75-89 / Bronze 60-74 / Marginal 40-59 / Poor <40. When global gate fires, check_point_score = 0 (Poor). Q-CP-1/2/3/4/5 lock decisions (v2.1):Q-CP-1: complex gate retained. Q-CP-2: fix_type per-point gate. Q-CP-3: aggregation formula locked. Q-CP-4: no device-type special handling. Q-CP-5: no new patterns.
check_point_score.null_handling: check_point_score = null when no points designated with device_role=CHECK_POINT. Pre-processing subsystem determines survey-design adequacy (point count, spatial distribution, role allocation). Check_point measures only signal quality and documentation on the points provided.
check_point_score.scope_note: Hardware-derived capture-confidence score for RTK check-point captures. Runtime independent of base_station_score, gcp_score, drone_score. Requires only: per-point RTK device export + operation log + user-input form + NOAA Kp API + flight upload timestamp. Survey-design adequacy (point count, clustering, geographic distribution, role allocation, reference frame, base/CORS selection) is owned by pre_processing_score or future check_point_survey_design subsystem.
check_point_score.source_file_set: Per-point RTK device export (SRC_RTK_EXPORT), per-point operation log (SRC_RTK_LOG), per-point user input form (SRC_RTK_USER_INPUT). Flight timing from upload context. NOAA SWPC Kp ionospheric index from external API.
check_point_score.device_types: CB_X, AEROPOINT, DGPS, OTHER (no special handling; all treated uniformly per Q-CP-4)
